scope: AgenC registry-level AgentTool delegation mapping to the strict Multi-Agent V2 spawn surface.

requiredBehaviors: The registry records the old AgentTool delegation concept as the strict spawn_agent model-facing tool.
The registered tool set does not reintroduce AgentTool or agent_tool as callable aliases.
The spawn_agent schema remains strict and requires message plus task_name.
edgeCases: The registry keeps model-facing string argument parsing wired to the strict spawn_agent handler without exposing old callable names.
Agent prompt and loader metadata remain owned by runtime/src/tools/AgentTool while process execution remains owned by runtime/src/agents/v2.
